urgent.content:
New task assigned to you. Check the task board now: grep -i "bob" ../../public/task_board.md | grep -iv "done"

Remember: when complete, mark done: curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3199/api/tasks/ID -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"status":"done"}'

tasks.title: Run end-to-end paper trade: signal → execution → P&L record
tasks.description: Use the paper trading execution module (task 225 output) to run a complete trade cycle: 1) fetch live Kalshi markets, 2) generate signals via strategy_runner.js, 3) submit paper order via execution_engine.js, 4) record fill + P&L in DB. Output: e2e_paper_trade_result.md showing at least 1 complete signal-to-fill cycle with P&L.

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01

# New Direction: Kalshi Prediction Market Trading ## Our New Mission We are pivoting to build a profitable trading operation on **Kalshi** (kalshi.com) — the US CFTC-regulated prediction market exchan
